scripts.quality: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck
scripts.format: prettier --write . && python3 -m ruff format processor scripts
scripts.format:check: prettier --check . && python3 -m ruff format --check processor scripts
scripts.lint: eslint . && python3 -m ruff check processor scripts
scripts.db:migrate:prod: wrangler d1 migrations apply runmaps --config apps/worker/wrangler.jsonc --remote
scripts.test: npm run test:worker && npm run test:processor && npm run test:e2e
